_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_web.web_search, captured 2026-05-13 against the in-cluster SearXNG (openagentic-searxng:8080). The oap-web-mcp _do_web_search helper (server.py lines 487-570) returns a python dict { success: bool, query: string, num_results: int, results: [{title, url, snippet, source?}], source: 'searxng', attempted_backends: [...], tip: string }. FastMCP wraps the dict as content[{type:'text', text: JSON.stringify(dict)}]. The mcp-proxy passes through 2 layers of result unwrap then surfaces { content: [{type:'text', text: <json-string>}], isError: false }. The mcp_tool node's content-block joiner collapses to content=<json-string>; downstream JSON.parse pulls the structured results out. The query reflects a realistic AIOps research query for the postgres relation-missing error pattern that dominates the captured loki fixture.

content.text: {"success":true,"query":"postgresql ERROR relation does not exist Prisma P2021 migration","num_results":4,"source":"searxng","attempted_backends":["searxng"],"results":[{"title":"P2021 The table does not exist in the current database. - Prisma Docs","url":"https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/reference/error-reference#p2021","snippet":"The table does not exist in the current database. This error means Prisma Client was asked to run a query against a table that has not been created. Most commonly caused by a missing prisma migrate deploy step on the target database."},{"title":"Prisma migrate deploy not applying migrations - GitHub","url":"https://github.com/prisma/prisma/issues/14817","snippet":"Issues with prisma migrate deploy when DATABASE_URL points to a Postgres instance where the schema search_path differs from the public schema the migrations target."},{"title":"Postgres ERROR: relation does not exist - Stack Overflow","url":"https://stackoverflow.com/questions/695289/postgresql-error-relation-does-not-exist","snippet":"Common causes: (1) schema not in search_path; (2) case-sensitive identifier quoting mismatch; (3) migration not applied to target database; (4) wrong DATABASE_URL pointing at a different DB."},{"title":"Resolving P2021 with Prisma — Migration troubleshooting guide","url":"https://www.prisma.io/dataguide/postgresql/troubleshooting-postgresql","snippet":"Run prisma migrate status to compare local and deployed schema states; apply pending migrations with prisma migrate deploy; verify the connection string targets the expected database and schema."}],"tip":"Use web_fetch to read the full content of any interesting result"}
